lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Greetings! I am Alathazdrar, butler to the Demon Lords, and I offer thee my services for a mere 10000 coins!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do?

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: I have learned my trade under the leash of some of the harshest masters of the Demon Dimensions. I can cook to satisfy the most infernal stomachs, and fly on wings of flame to deposit thine items in the bank or bring

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: planks from the sawmill in seconds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your previous jobs.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: For millennia I have served and waited on the mighty Demon Lords of the Infernal Dimensions. I began as a humble footman in the household of Lord Thammaron, and for several centuries I was the private valet to

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Delrith. I have also worked in the Grim Underworld, escorting the souls of the dead to their final abodes. But the incessant shadows and hellfire weary me, so I have come to serve mortal masters in the realms of light.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: You, a mere mortal with level [1-49] Construction, wish to employ ME, butler to Great Ones of the Outer Darkness? Ha ha ha! I refuse to work for anyone below level 50 Construction.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're hired... well, I don't have the money on me, but can I owe you? I'm good for it, honest.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: I regret, Master, that I must insist on payment up front.}}

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're hired!

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: I shall devote my every art to thy service, my Master.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Master, the time for my payment draws near! My fee is 10,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pay you later.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Master, if thou desirest my continued service, thou must render unto me the 10,000 coins that are due me!

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Thank you, Master. Thou hast my unfailing service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pay you later.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Bones are a tool of prayer, and demonic magic prevents me from touching them, my Lord.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Thou shalt taste the very tea of the Demon Lords themselves!

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Behold, thy beverage is complete. Dost thou wish its dark heart softened by the milk of the cow?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I don't want any.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: I shall prepare thee a banquet fit for the lords of Pandemonium!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Serve drinks please.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: I shall keep the drink flowing, Master!

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Desire'st thou a beverage, my lord?

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Enjoy thy drink!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay at the entrance and greet guests.

lines.speaker: Demon butler
lines.text: Yes, Master. I shall spread the aura of thy hospitality to all visitors!
